name: ocas-sift
description: Web search, research synthesis, fact verification, and entity extraction. Use when the user needs topic research, web lookups, fact-checking across multiple sources, document summarization, or structured information extraction. Trigger phrases: 'research this topic', 'find information about', 'verify this claim', 'summarize this article', 'compare these options'. Do not use for person-focused OSINT investigations (Scout) or image processing (Look).
author: Indigo Karasu
